title: Probabilistic Models Path
description: Build fluency in Probabilistic Models inside Statistical Models by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Latent Variable Models
steps.summary: Models that involve latent variables, which are variables that are not directly observed but are inferred from the data. It sits inside Statistical Models / Probabilistic Models. Compare it with Markov Processes and Markov Chains. It opens into Latent-Variable PCFG and Latent Variable Coref.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Gaussian Mixture Model (GMM)
steps.summary: A probabilistic model that represents a distribution as a mixture of Gaussian distributions. It sits inside Statistical Models / Probabilistic Models. Start after Gaussian Mixture Model and Gaussian Mixture Models.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Markov Processes
steps.summary: Markov Processes belongs to the Statistical Models area of AI/ML, within Probabilistic Models. It sits inside Statistical Models / Probabilistic Models. Start after Markov Model. It opens into Markov decision processes and Markov Decision Processes (MDP).
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Hidden Markov Models (HMM)
steps.summary: Hidden Markov Models (HMM) belongs to the Statistical Models area of AI/ML, within Probabilistic Models. It sits inside Statistical Models / Probabilistic Models. Start after Markov Model and Hidden Markov Models.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Markov Model
steps.summary: Markov Model belongs to the Statistical Models area of AI/ML, within Probabilistic Models. It sits inside Statistical Models / Probabilistic Models. Compare it with Markov Processes and Markov Chains. It opens into Markov Chains and Markov Processes.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Gaussian Mixture Models (GMM)
steps.summary: Gaussian Mixture Models (GMM) belongs to the Statistical Models area of AI/ML, within Probabilistic Models. It sits inside Statistical Models / Probabilistic Models. Start after Gaussian Mixture Model and Gaussian Mixture Models.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Markov Chains
steps.summary: Markov Chains belongs to the Statistical Models area of AI/ML, within Probabilistic Models. It sits inside Statistical Models / Probabilistic Models. Start after Markov Model.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.
